items.title: US to cut troop levels in Germany by 5,000 amid Trump spat with Merz
items.summary: The decision to reduce the US deployment to Germany comes amid a row between the two allies over Iran.

items.title: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
items.summary: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.

items.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
items.summary: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.
